items.summary: ARGENTINA boss Lionel Scaloni was so emotional after beating Egypt he couldn't finish his post-match interview. items.title: England hand abject India their biggest T20I defeat to take 2-0 series lead
items.summary: England handed an abject India their record defeat in T20 internationals as they won the third T20I at Trent Bridge by 125 runs to storm into a 2-0 series lead.

items.title: Fifa investigating alleged racist abuse of IShowSpeed
items.summary: Fifa has opened an investigation following allegations of racist abuse involving American social media influencer IShowSpeed and a supporter during Argentina's 3-2 win over Cape Verde on Friday.
